## We Say

Q2M Leather Cleaner Natural is Gyeons latest mild leather cleanser suitable for all types of modern automotive leather including delicate nappa and semi-aniline upholstery.
Whilst it doesn't pack as much "punch" as the Q2M Leather Cleaner Strong, it is more versatile, being able to be used on all types of modern leather, so would make for a perfect regular use cleanser.

## Key Features

Agitation Required

Yes

(See how to use)

Cleaning Strength

*5*/10

(Compared to others)

Dilutable

No

(Ready to use)

## Description

**Gyeon Q2M Leather Cleaner Natural** is a gentle, pH-neutral cleanser for all types of modern leather. It has been designed for luxury and sports cars featuring delicate nappa and semi-aniline upholstery, but of course it is also suitable for any type of modern leather covering.

Q2M Leather Cleaner Natural works perfectly as a cleaner, but also works perfectly to prepare the leather for the application of a leather coating or protectant such as Q2 Leather Shield or Q2 Leather Coat. Q2M Leather Cleaner Natural removes light dirt, oily residues and even light discolouration. This formula does not include any softening or preserving additives which helps to prevent the appearance changing, as well as leaving the best base for coatings.

## How To Use

Ensure the leather is clear and free of debris. Spray Q2M Leather Cleaner Natural either directly onto the surface or onto a leather brush or scrub pad. Gently scrub the leather and wipe away any residue with a clean microfibre towel. Repeat if necessary. 
Once clean the leather should be restored to a matte finish and ready for coating or protecting if desired.
